entries.title: Hy-Embodied-0.5-VLA: From Vision-Language-Action Models to a Real-World Robot Learning Stack
entries.authors: He Zhang, Lingzhu Xiang, et al.
entries.abstract: End-to-end system spanning full robot learning stack: data collection, model design, continued pre-training and supervised fine-tuning.

entries.title: ReactVLA: Fast and Lightweight Reactive Robot Manipulation via Improved Mean Flow Action Generation
entries.authors: Yanzhao Guo, Wenkai Chen, Jianwei Zhang
entries.abstract: Diffusion-based VLA policies with improved mean flow action generation for fast robot manipulation.

entries.title: When and How Severely: Scenario-Specific Safety Envelopes for Driving VLAs
entries.authors: Abhinaw Priyadershi, Jelena Frtunikj
entries.abstract: Safety certification of Vision-Language-Action driving planners under ISO 21448 (SOTIF). Proposes scenario-specific safety envelopes addressing when and how severely driving VLAs can deviate.

entries.title: RT-VLA: Real-Time Vision-Language-Action Models via Knowledge Distillation
entries.authors: Xiangyu Huang, Zhenlin Hua, et al.
entries.abstract: VLA models for end-to-end autonomous driving with knowledge distillation for real-time inference. Jointly models perception, language reasoning, explainability and action prediction.

entries.title: Self-Improving VLA Policies: Selected Diffusion Noise for Spurious-Robust Action Smoothing
entries.authors: Duc Minh Nguyen, Bao-Ngoc Dao, et al.
entries.abstract: Diffusion-based VLA policies with self-improving robustness against spurious visual correlations.

entries.title: Encoder Winners Do Not Reliably Transfer Across VLA Backbone Scale
entries.authors: Qingping Zeng, Fei She
entries.abstract: Shows that encoder choice validated on small VLA model does not necessarily transfer to larger backbone scales.

entries.title: PhysVLA: Towards Physically-Grounded VLA for Embodied Robotic Manipulation
entries.authors: Namai Chandra, Shriram Damodaran, Lin Wang
entries.abstract: VLA models with physical grounding for robotic manipulation, addressing behavioral cloning limitations.

entries.title: SIMMER: Benchmarking Latent Failures in LLM Executable Planning with a World Model
entries.authors: Xiaoxin Lu, Ranran Haoran Zhang, Rui Zhang
entries.abstract: Benchmark for evaluating latent failures in LLM-based planning using world models.

entries.title: ReactSim-Bench: Benchmarking Reactive Behavior World Model Simulation in Autonomous Driving
entries.authors: Zhiyuan Zhang, Yanlun Peng, et al.
entries.abstract: Benchmark for reactive behavior world model simulators in autonomous driving systems. Evaluates how simulated world agents respond feasibly to autonomous vehicle actions.

entries.title: Multi-Agent Embodied Autonomous Driving: From V2X Information Exchange to Shared World Models
entries.authors: Senkang Hu, Zhengru Fang, et al.
entries.abstract: Survey on multi-agent embodied autonomous driving with shared perception, intent inference, and coordination through V2X and shared world models.

entries.title: A Tutorial on World Models and Physical AI
entries.authors: Il-Seok Oh
entries.abstract: Tutorial on world models as central principle for building intelligent systems capable of prediction, reasoning, and decision making.

entries.title: Ambient Diffusion Policy: Imitation Learning from Suboptimal Data in Robotics
entries.authors: Adam Wei, Nicholas Pfaff, et al.
entries.abstract: Diffusion policy for imitation learning from suboptimal robot demonstration data.

entries.title: MODIP: Efficient Model-Based Optimization for Diffusion Policies
entries.authors: Zakariae El Asri, et al.
entries.abstract: Model-based optimization framework for diffusion policies in robot learning.

entries.title: Unifying Object-Centric World Models and Diffusion Policy: A Hierarchical Framework for Multi-Stage Robotic Tasks
entries.authors: Raktim Gautam Goswami, et al.
entries.abstract: Hierarchical framework unifying object-centric world models and diffusion policy within MPC for multi-stage robotic tasks.

entries.title: Latent Diffusion Policy: Shaping Latent Spaces for Diffusion-Based Robotic Manipulation
entries.authors: Zhexuan Zhou, et al.
entries.abstract: Latent space diffusion policy that separates scene comprehension from trajectory generation.

entries.title: PACT: Self-Evolving Physical Safety Alignment for Diffusion Policies in Embodied Manipulation
entries.authors: Lingxuan Wu, et al.
entries.abstract: Safety alignment for diffusion policies ensuring physical constraint satisfaction.

entries.title: Understanding Cross-Sensor Feature Variations for Generalizable 3D Perception
entries.authors: Xin Qiu, Wenjie Liu, et al.
entries.abstract: Analysis of cross-sensor feature variations for radar-camera BEV perception across datasets.

entries.title: SceneMiner: Identity-Preserving Multi-Task Fine-Tuning for Unified BEV Scene Mining
entries.authors: Abdalmalek Aburaddaha, et al.
entries.abstract: Mining hard safety-critical scenes from driving logs using unified BEV representation.

entries.title: EditSSC: Toward Editable Semantic Occupancy Scenes with Unconditional Diffusion Models
entries.authors: Fatima Balde, Raoul de Charette, Alexandre Boulch
entries.abstract: Editable 3D semantic scene generation for autonomous driving using unconditional diffusion models.

entries.title: Distortion-Aware PETR for BEV Object Detection with Mixed Pinhole-Fisheye Cameras
entries.authors: Xiangzhong Liu
entries.abstract: Distortion-aware BEV detection method for mixed pinhole-fisheye camera setups.

entries.title: Geometry-Aware Fisheye-LiDAR Fusion for Robust 3D Object Detection in Low-Overlap Setups
entries.authors: Xiangzhong Liu, Xihao Wang, Hao Shen
entries.abstract: Geometry-aware fisheye-LiDAR fusion for 3D detection in cost-sensitive sparse-view sensor configurations.

entries.title: Cross-View Urban Traffic Dataset: Drone-Supervised Ground Truth for Monocular BEV Localization
entries.authors: Prakhar Bhardwaj, et al.
entries.abstract: Cross-view urban traffic dataset with drone-supervised ground truth for monocular BEV localization.

entries.title: IDOL: Inverse-Dynamics-Guided Future Prediction for End-to-End Autonomous Driving
entries.authors: Chenghao Zhang, Timin Li, Dongmei Li
entries.abstract: Inverse-dynamics-guided future prediction for end-to-end autonomous driving with world-model-based planning.

entries.title: AnyScene: Towards Highly Controllable Driving Scene Generation at Anywhere and Beyond
entries.authors: Haiming Zhang, et al.
entries.abstract: Controllable high-fidelity synthetic driving scene generation for addressing long-tail safety-critical scenarios.

entries.title: Diffusion Transformer World-Action Model for AV Scene Prediction
entries.authors: Ruslan Sharifullin, Benjamin Jiang, Kai Xi Chew
entries.abstract: Action-conditioned world model using Diffusion Transformer to predict future camera scenes from planned controls for autonomous vehicles.

entries.title: VISA: VLM-Guided Instance Semantic Auditing for 3D Occupancy World Models
entries.authors: Ruiqi Xian, Yuehan Xian, et al.
entries.abstract: Semantic 3D occupancy world model auditing using VLM guidance for detecting object and rare-class errors.
